codeReview.summary: The commit tightens global record-link rewriting to a syntax-based subset while preserving arbitrary-table string-form RecordId compatibility through the field-aware deserialize seam. The added regression coverage demonstrates both halves of VAL-HYDRATE-006: ordinary colon strings roundtrip unchanged and true string-form links still hydrate foreign models, while graph/repository RecordId flows remain intact.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit 3e529fa. The implementation satisfies the feature contract and VAL-HYDRATE-006 with no blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
